candidate_definitions.text: Welcome to the Microsoft Voice Assistant samples repository! Here you will find samples to help you get started building client application for your bot or Custom Command service. You will also be able to easily deploy a working Custom Command based Voice Assistant to your own Azure subscription
Welcome to the Bot Framework Tools repository, which is the home for a set of tools for developers building bots with the Microsoft Bot Framework

The Bot Framework SDK team is happy to announce the General Availability of the consolidated bot framework CLI tool [bf-cli](https://aka.ms/bfcli). The new BF CLI tool will replace legacy standalone tools to manage Bot Framework bots and related services. The old tools will be p…
